decode  
quantum 
recode  
the world 
Riverlane is the world leader in Quantum Error Correction (QEC), the technology that unlocks quantum computing's promise of a new age of human progress.
![](https://www.riverlane.com/media/5oipz2lc/brand_film_cover.jpg?rmode=max&width=800&v=1dc896d63c074b0)
The fragility of qubits means today's quantum computers fail under an avalanche of data errors long before they reach utility-scale. Riverlane builds QEC tools and technology that correct quantum errors as quickly as they occur. Using sophisticated codes and decoders on proprietary QEC chips, our technology identifies and corrects errors millions, and ultimately billions, of times per second.
We accelerate the quantum ecosystem by working closely with many of the world's leading quantum computer manufacturers, government bodies and high-performance computing (HPC) centres. Together, we're opening a world of new possibilities.
## Quantum error  
correction solutions
Whatever your state of QEC readiness, Riverlane's suite of QEC hardware, software and service solutions accelerate your journey to quantum utility.
Your QEC journey starts here.
[ ![](https://www.riverlane.com/media/zvwfmgdf/deltakit_cta.jpg?rmode=max&width=800&v=1dc896eccb93550) ![](https://www.riverlane.com/media/30wgijyp/deltakit_logo_colour.svg?rmode=max&width=800&v=1dc896ee7e821b0) The open-source software for developing and adopting Quantum Error Correction Discover more  ](https://www.riverlane.com/deltakit) [ ![](https://www.riverlane.com/media/andlttia/deltaflow_cta_v2.jpg?rmode=max&width=800&v=1dc896f0e7201c0) ![](https://www.riverlane.com/media/hipjiohs/deltaflow_logo_colour.svg?rmode=max&width=800&v=1dc896f1dd6e4f0) The world's leading QEC system for real-time quantum computing at utility scale Discover more  ](https://www.riverlane.com/deltaflow)

## Join us
Mastering quantum error correction is a complex challenge. Our team is uniquely built for this pioneering task.
We employ many of the world's leading quantum scientists and computer hardware and software engineers at various career stages. What powers us forward is our open culture, desire to learn and a shared mission to solve QEC and realise quantum computing's full potential.
[View opportunities](https://www.riverlane.com/culture-careers)
